name: Frostcub
description: A bear cub with fur as hard as frozen iron. Slow, but hits like a glacier.

moves.name: ❄️ Ice Shard
moves.desc: Spits a frozen pellet. May paralyze with the cold shock.

moves.name: ⚔️ Bear Slam
moves.desc: Full-body drop onto the enemy. May cause flinch.

moves.name: 💊 Glacial Heal
moves.desc: Absorbs cold energy to restore HP.

moves.name: 🌨️ Freeze Aura
moves.desc: Radiates numbing cold — enemy may fall into frozen sleep.

moves.name: 📈 Power Up
moves.desc: Fur bristles and hardens — ATK rises sharply.

moves.name: 🌬️ Frost Breath
moves.desc: Exhales freezing air that deals damage and may put enemy to sleep.

moves.name: 🛡️ Iron Wall
moves.desc: Puffs up frozen fur as armour. Lowers enemy ATK.

moves.name: 🧊 Glacial Crush
moves.desc: A slow, devastating body press. The heaviest hit in Frostcub's arsenal.
